creator: fabian@wenks.ch
text:
The part after the . at the starting of the line got cut away, 
here it is:

root@batman:~# gfind
.
Segmentation fault: 11 (core dumped)

-rw-------  1 root  wheel  2236416 May 23 18:34 gfind.core
root@batman:~#
